{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321141411F879241BCF1B5AD9115C"}"},"total":32469},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7135119091593560869","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"蝴蝶笔下生花，春丫妙不可言。本书真真的是超级好笑，爆笑的那种。而且笑点与泪点的平衡，蝴蝶掌握的极好。笑起来的时候，床抖人笑翻，上班不能看。家国情怀时，令人肃然起敬，不禁泪目。九十分的爆笑，加上十分的感人，恰到好处。实在是一部佳作！是最好的书之一。蝴蝶加油～继续追你的下一部书！","text_exts":[{"e":73,"s":69,"text":"家国情怀","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AE%B6%E5%9B%BD%E6%83%85%E6%80%80&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740736515AD9115C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227135119091593560869%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226845613841254976523%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AE%B6%E5%9B%BD%E6%83%85%E6%80%80%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1661274755,"group_id":"6845613841254976523","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"未经他人苦，莫劝他人善。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N73LwGuNx4zEo1QQFZnnE6iIte43zGTxfYf5GHONiOV3","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3730ebc028d542fa82efd0efaeae17ae~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614565&x-signature=DywPDe%2FaAzd0IhFeoaPEvmYpn7A%3D","user_id":"2648096773520077","user_name":"国家举重队抬杠冠军"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2648096773520077","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6845613841254976523","book_info":{"abstract":"全家因为一场意外穿越到了古代，也不知道算是幸运还是不幸。
刚醒来就得知家里没钱也没田，还有一屁股的债要还。全身上下也没个金手指。
不过，跟他们一起来的那条狗，却有点意思，这狗莫不是条神犬？
这一大家子，要养家糊口，要父慈子孝，要学习进步，任务重时间紧，且看他们如何用完美的姿势空降古代。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/b091cb3292721f2b3cdffdb056e69b0f","author":"蝴蝶不愿意","author_id":"","book_id":"6845613841254976523","book_name":"全家穿越：古代生存十八法","book_short_name":"春田喜事","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a0c8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6845616598137438724","read_count":"77850","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3120300"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"1348","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,今穿古,发家致富,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5bc9dfdda21d9709d4b3afe335efd290~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257651&x-signature=mjNEJxHbw0t%2FXO9FidFUcpHqStg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109835686176","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.23208455e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321141411F879241BCF1B5AD9115C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读118小时后点评"},"st
